base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of level_7_demon_first_quest — a tile (level_layout) from 1986 legend of zelda. Level 7 'Demon' — Gleeok (4-heads) boss, Red Candle-item. Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
